title: Advances and Future Directions in Antibody-Drug Conjugates: From Paradigm Shifts to Data-Driven Design.
snippet: : Antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) have evolved from early heterogeneous constructs into a mature therapeutic platform with exponential clinical relevance. This review highlights recent advances in ADC design and development, with emphasis on antigen selection, antibody engineering, linker and payload innovation, site-specific conjugation, clinical translati...
